title: jacobaea × liechtensteinensis
intro: Jacobaea × liechtensteinensis, also known as the Liechtenstein's Jacobaea or Jacobaea × liechtensteinensis, is a rare hybrid plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between the Jacobaea aquatica and Jacobaea maritima. The medicinal properties of Jacobaea × liechtensteinensis include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help manage digestive issues, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jacobaea × liechtensteinensis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestive health and relieve pain.
